title: Roasted Australian Lamb Roast
description: A traditional Australian dish featuring a perfectly roasted lamb roast, served with a side of roasted vegetables.
instructions: Season the lamb roast with salt, pepper, rosemary, and thyme.
Heat the olive oil in a large oven-safe pan over medium-high heat.
Sear the lamb roast on all sides until browned, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Transfer the pan to the preheated oven and roast for 20 minutes.
Reduce heat to 180°C (350°F) and continue roasting for an additional 40-50 minutes, or until the lamb reaches your desired level of doneness.
Toss the carrots, potatoes, and onions in a bowl with a little olive oil, salt, and pepper.
Spread the vegetables out in a single layer on a baking sheet and roast in the oven for 30-40 minutes, or until tender.
Let the lamb roast rest for 10-15 minutes before slicing and serving with the roasted vegetables.
